title: [Pitcher Perfect]
description: Deep wine red canvas drapes in gentle folds, casting a warm glow over the cozy interior.  A sturdy wooden counter, its surface stained by years of contact with fruits and spices, stretches across the space, while baskets filled with fruit rest nearby.   Hanging lanterns sway overhead, their amber light flickering over the gleaming wine-bowls and goblets that line the mahogany shelves along the tent's curved walls.
